description: Add volume confirmation filter to entry — require current bar volume > 1.2x its 20-bar SMA to confirm breakout is backed by real participation, not just thin-air spike.
Increase volatility scaling floor from 0.20→0.40 to allow larger positions during high-vol regimes where the biggest trends occur, while keeping drawdown well below the 30% gate.
Shorten breakout entry period from 24→20 bars to widen the candidate set and capture momentum earlier in strong trends.
Add 200-bar SMA regime filter: only enter when close > SMA200 to avoid counter-trend trades in bear regimes, replacing the DI alignment condition that is redundant with the ADX momentum filter.
Replace ATR-trailing-stop with a simpler percent-based trailing stop (7%) to create a consistent risk-reward profile without ATR-dependent exit logic — the current dual ATR exit (trailing stop + time
Loosen entry by reducing breakout period 24→20 bars and ATR regime threshold 1.0→0.95 to widen candidate set from the over-filtered 5-condition stack.

Add Stochastic oscillator (%K < 80) as a secondary confirmation filter alongside ADX>25 to reject breakouts that occur in overbought territory where momentum is already extended and reversal risk is e

Remove Stochastic filter (caused 0-trade crash) and replace time-decay exit with ATR contraction exit — exit when current ATR < 0.75 × ATR at entry, capturing when volatility regime shifts from trendi
Add ATR multiple take-profit exit alongside the existing ATR trailing stop — structural exit diversification rather than entry-filter tweaks that keep getting discarded.

Extend time-decay exit from 40→60 bars to let strong trends run longer before the forced time exit closes them — the ATR trailing stop already handles early stop-loss duty; 40 bars was cutting winning
Add MACD histogram momentum exit: exit when MACD histogram turns negative to lock in gains as trend loses momentum, without adding new entry filters.

Remove the vol-regime entry filter (ATR > ATR_MA × threshold) — it blocks trades at the precise moment volatility regime shifts from low to high, which is when the strongest momentum breakouts occur.

Remove the volume confirmation filter from entry conditions — it's overly restrictive on 24/7 crypto markets where retail-driven breakouts often lack the institutional volume spike that confirms a leg
Remove the volatility-regime entry filter (ATR > ATR_MA × threshold) to widen the entry set and avoid blocking trades at the precise moment volatility regime shifts from low to high.

Replace Donchian breakout entry with Bollinger Band breakout (volatility-adaptive) and remove the redundant 200-bar SMA regime filter — Bollinger upper-band breakout already adapts to volatility regim

Invert the regime-adaptive ATR multiplier logic (currently inverted: uses LOOSER stop in high-vol regimes when it should use TIGHTER). Low-vol → 2.5x ATR, high-vol → 3.0x ATR. High-vol breakouts are t

Fix AttributeError in `_atr_regime_adjusted_sma`: replace pandas `.iloc[]` calls with numpy array indexing on `adjusted_n` (which is already a numpy array after `np.clip`).
Replace the binary regime-adaptive ATR trailing stop with a continuous volatility-sensitive stop (Chandelier-style fixed % plus smoothing) for better regime differentiation.
Fix inverted ATR trailing stop multipliers — high-vol should use tighter stops (2.5x) not looser (3.5x), matching the inverse vol scaling that already reduces size during high-vol breakouts.
